SendMessageResponse.SendMessageResult: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><TransferMessage xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/messaging/v1"><Header><MessageType>TransferError</MessageType><TransferDate>2025-02-14T01:07:08.4663959+02:00</TransferDate><TransferGUID>b2fe4799a36f4b6c9e2d47b222a7ea48</TransferGUID></Header><Body><Error><TransferGUID>b2fe4799a36f4b6c9e2d47b222a7ea48</TransferGUID><ErrorDescription>Възникна грешка при обработка на данните The underlying provider failed on Open.</ErrorDescription></Error></Body></TransferMessage>
